brand.tagline: The SaaS platform to run your pharmacy from the checkout to compliance.
brand.region: Built for modern pharmacies — cloud, multi-user, ready for Africa and beyond.

n1.title: One tool
n1.text: Sales, inventory, patients, purchasing, and finance in one unified interface.

n2.title: Secure multi-tenant
n2.text: Dedicated space per pharmacy, roles and permissions, full action traceability.

n3.title: Built to scale
n3.text: From point of sale to supply chain and decision-ready reporting.

clientJourney.subtitle: From onboarding to loyalty: a clear path for your team and your patients.

s1.title: Get started in minutes
s1.text: Sign up, provisioning of your space, and secure login (Keycloak). Your team uses its dedicated subdomain.

s2.title: Configure the pharmacy
s2.text: Settings, users, document templates, sequences — adapt the platform to your organization.

s3.title: Run day-to-day operations
s3.text: Check out at the POS, manage inventory, prescriptions, and deliveries from one ecosystem.

s4.title: Steer and retain
s4.text: Dashboards, reports, loyalty, and notifications to engage patients and protect margin.

daily.label: Daily execution
daily.intro: Everything that happens at the counter and in the back office, in real time.

care.label: Patients & care
care.intro: Patient records, prescriptions, and vaccination tracking in one place.

supply.label: Supply chain
supply.intro: From purchase request to goods receipt.

finance.label: Finance, insurance & billing
finance.intro: Collections, operational accounting, and third-party payment.

distribution.label: Distribution & service
distribution.intro: Extend your pharmacy beyond the counter.

org.label: Team & platform
org.intro: SaaS governance: users, documents, and subscription.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Key metrics, shortcuts to modules, and a concise view of pharmacy activity.
dashboard.outcome1: Quick read on volumes and alerts

pos.title: Point of sale
pos.description: Front-desk sales, basket, discounts, and a smooth experience to shorten queues.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Product catalog, movements, reorder suggestions, and stock levels to limit waste and stockouts.

patients.title: Patients
patients.description: Patient files and interaction history to support dispensing and continuity of care.

prescriptions.title: Prescriptions
prescriptions.description: Capture and track prescriptions to secure the path from prescription to delivery.

vaccination.title: Vaccination
vaccination.description: Track vaccinations delivered in-store for compliance and patient follow-up.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Centralize partners, terms, and foundations to move into ordering.

supply-chain.title: Supply chain
supply-chain.description: Purchase requests, POs, GRNs, supplier quotes, and inbound flow management.

billing-ops.title: Billing (operations)
billing-ops.description: Issue and track billing tied to pharmacy activity (customers, related payments).

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Centralize payment methods for your market (including mobile money where configured).

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: Activity-linked accounting: entries, journals, and financial insight for the owner.

e-invoice.title: E-invoicing
e-invoice.description: Prepare for dematerialization and structured exchange with the ecosystem.
e-invoice.planNote: May depend on plan or entitlements.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: Handle insurance cases to speed up service at the counter.

delivery.title: Deliveries
delivery.description: Manage deliveries for a structured home service and order tracking.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Framework for pharmacy quality requirements: procedures, controls, and monitoring.

business-audit.title: Business journal & audit
business-audit.description: Business event logging for internal audit, compliance, and investigation.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Analyze activity to find margin and sell-through levers.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Business and financial reports for management and local obligations.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.description: Retain patients with points / perks aligned with your commercial strategy.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Inform staff and patients about important events (stock, orders, reminders).

hr.title: Human resources
hr.description: HR management for the pharmacy tied to access and ways of working.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: General settings, document sequences, templates, and preferences to fit the system to your pharmacy.

saas-billing.title: Subscription & platform billing
saas-billing.description: SaaS subscription management, plan upgrades, and billing sync (e.g. Stripe) per your offer.
